lever: de-delegate the directed case (native _raw_negative_edge_cycle is undirected-only, so directed always delegated -> full fnx->nx conversion, 6.46x slower). In-process SPFA: add a virtual super-source joined to every node, run the Bellman-Ford negative-cycle detector on a native to_dict_of_dicts snapshot. Deterministic boolean -> no tie-break parity concern.

parity.edge_cases: empty-edges, negative self-loop, heuristic=False all match nx

headline: negative_edge_cycle directed: 6.46x slower than nx -> ~1.3x near-parity, ~4x self-speedup, byte-exact bool. Pure Python, no rebuild. Reuses the SPFA negative-cycle detector from the bellman_ford port.
